page.title: Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma (NHL) — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma: 188 alterations and 734 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

gmi_articles.title: Ultra-processed food consumption and cancer risk.
Combined fruit and vegetable consumption was associated with decreased non-Hodgkin lymphoma risk.
Consumption of red and processed meat may be related to non-Hodgkin lymphoma risk.
Evidence from epidemiological studies suggests a compelling link between exposure to glyphosate-based herbicide and increased risk of non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Green tea intake may be associated with reduced risk of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma.
Review: there is a consistently strong inverse correlations with solar UVB for 15 types of cancers.
Ultraviolet radiation exposure reduces the risk of malignant lymphomas.
Increased sun exposure of children may also be associated with a decreased risk of developing both childhood non Hodgkin and Hodgkin lymphoma.
Mineral oil exposures also contribute to the incidence and mortality of lung, melanoma, and possibly esophageal and stomach cancers and of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma in aerospace workers.
The clinical cases presented here reinforce the hypothesis that GcMAF could become part of anticancer immunotherapeutic regimens.
The results of this study found that many non-hodgkin lymphoma survivors are not meeting health recommendations and could impact their health-related quality of life.
A high frequency of celiac disease was found in patients with lymphoma in the southeast region of Turkey.
Cannabinoids may have a therapeutic role to play in treating mantle cell lymphoma.
Chronic tylenol use is associated wtih an almost two-fold increased risk of blood cancer.
Diet and nutrient intakes and risk of non-hodgkin’s lymphoma in Connecticut women.
Each 10% increment in the consumption of UPF was associated with a 22% higher odds ratio of chronic lymphocytic leukemia.
Effect of a 16-session qigong program in non-hodgkin lymphoma survivors.
Exposure to phenoxyacetic acids and glyphosate as risk factors for non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Glyphosate pesticide (Roundup) exposure is a risk factor for non-Hodgkin lymphoma and Hairy Cell leukemia.
Glyphosate pesticide (Roundup) exposure is a risk factor for non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
In men,≥1 daily serving of diet soda increased risks of NHL and multiple myleoma.
Integrative analysis of spontaneous CLL regression highlights genetic and microenvironmental interdependency in CLL.
Intensive treatment strategies may not provide superior outcomes in mantle cell lymphoma.
Mistletoe extract is known to induce apoptosis and immunactivation in chronic lymphocytic leukemia, and has been shown to have a non-propogating effect on leukemic cells.
Participants who were in the qigong group had lower fatigue intensity scores than those in the control group.
Plasma magnesium is inversely associated with Epstein-Barr virus load in peripheral blood and Burkitt lymphoma
Rice bran arabinoxylan and curcumin therapy may be of benefit to patients with early-stage B-cell lymphoid malignancies.
Simian virus 40 has a high prevalence in hematological malignancies and probably plays a role in tumor pathogenesis.
Some patients with NHL possessed immunoreactivity to gliadin , indicating this protein may contribute to immune imbalance in the condition.
Sun exposure may protect against non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Sunlight has a protective effect against non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
SV40 is associated significantly with brain tumors, bone cancers, malignant mesothelioma, and non-Hodgkin's lymphoma.
The incidence of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma was significantly increased in patients with dermatitis herpetiformis, indicating the potential that wheat/gluten may contribute to malignancies.
The study data indicates a strong association between Non-Hodgkin lymphoma and SV40.
There is a high prevalance rate for simian virus 40 in diffuse large B-cell lymphomas in Tunisia.
There is a risk excess of Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma observed in telecommunication and transport workers which could be explained by electromagnetic radiation exposure.
These results indicate an association between T-cell Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma and the use of cellular and cordless telephones.
This study indicates that higher serum carotenoid levels might be inversely associated with non-Hodgkin lymphoma risk.
This study suggests that increasing vegetable and citrus fruit consumption could be a useful strategy to improve survival in non-hodgkin lymphoma patients.
Vegetables and perhaps fruits could help lower the risks of non-Hodgkin's lymphoma and follicular lymphoma in particular.

remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: Indolent NHL (follicular): spontaneous remission in 20-30% of early-stage, allowing watch-and-wait; aggressive NHL (DLBCL): rapidly lethal without treatment in weeks-months
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: DLBCL with R-CHOP: 60-70% cure rate; Pola-R-CHP (polatuzumab): 27% improvement in 2-year PFS (POLARIX); DLBCL relapsed: axicabtagene ciloleucel (axi-cel) CAR-T: 40-50% long-term remission; follicular lymphoma: obinutuzumab + chemotherapy 85-90% response, durable
remission.gap_size: Variable by subtype; DLBCL has genuinely curative potential; indolent NHL remains manageable but generally incurable with current therapy
remission.barrier_detail: CAR-T therapy is transformative in relapsed DLBCL but manufacturing time (2-3 weeks), cost ($400K+), and centre requirements limit access; bispecific antibodies (epcoritamab, glofitamab) offer off-the-shelf alternative
remission.last_soc_change: 2022-2023 — bispecific antibodies (epcoritamab, glofitamab) approved for relapsed DLBCL; CAR-T as second-line (ZUMA-7, TRANSFORM) since 2022; Pola-R-CHP first-line 2023; R-CHOP since 2000 (CHOP since 1970s)
remission.outdated_treatments: CHOP without rituximab in CD20+ NHL (R-CHOP demonstrated superior survival in 2002, yet rituximab-free regimens occasionally still used); stem cell transplant as second-line without CAR-T consideration in eligible patients
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Exercise during chemotherapy (reduces fatigue, maintains QoL); immunonutrition; lymphoma-specific psycho-oncology support; infection prophylaxis optimisation during rituximab-based therapy
remission.frontier_signal: Bispecific antibodies (epcoritamab subcutaneous 2023; glofitamab fixed-duration 2023); CAR-T optimisation (allogeneic off-the-shelf); anti-CD47 (magrolimab + rituximab Phase 3); PD-1/PD-L1 combinations; BTK degraders (non-covalent for ibrutinib-resistant CLL/NHL)
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.

burden.note: Tier from NIH FY funding ÷ US DALYs (or mortality proxy) vs corpus quartiles
